The '''container hangar''' was a sizable box-shaped freight container manufactured by [[Xizor Transport Systems/Legends|Xizor Transport Systems]]. Designed specifically to contain multiple [[Cargo container/Legends|cargo containers]] in the [[Xizor cargo container|Xizor line]], the container hangar could be customized with [[Laser/Legends|laser]] [[Laser cannon/Legends|turrets]] for protection. In addition, a number of them served as [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] hangars for installations that required [[Starfighter combat/Legends|starfighter defense]], but did not have the hangar facilities to support them. The [[TIE Experimental Project]] used container hangars to store the Experimental TIEs both at the [[Nomlis III]] Factory and at [[Obsidian (XQ1 Platform)|Obsidian]] platform.<ref name="Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance">''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''</ref>
